msg: Control flow of non-void function ends here!
reasoning: Line 38 is inside ep93xx_open(), which returns int. It has 'if (ep93xx_alloc_buffers()) return -ENOMEM;' — only one return path. When ep93xx_alloc_buffers() returns 0 (no error), the function exits without a return value — undefined behavior. This is a genuine control-flow bug. The presence condition [def(CONFIG_EP93XX_ETH)] is correctly constrained: ep93xx_open() only exists when that macro is defined. This is a different function than the one in FAMILY_16 but the same file. The vbdb entry documents a BehaviorViolation (separate issue). New true positive, correctly constrained.
